changeSet.author: odysejapka
changeSet.comment: Add performance_at and performance_time columns to team_results
changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE team_results ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS performance_at varchar(255); ALTER TABLE team_results ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS performance_time varchar(255);

changeSet.author: odysejapka
changeSet.comment: Extract performanceAt and performanceTime from JSONB results into new columns
changeSet.sql: UPDATE team_results SET performance_at = results->>'performanceAt', performance_time = results->>'performanceTime' WHERE results IS NOT NULL AND (performance_at IS NULL OR performance_time IS NULL);
